name: universal-assembler
description: An antiframework for agent-driven development. A lattice that snaps growing software to its own declared motifs.
//: CANONICAL alias map. The `imports` field below is the single source of truth for #<alias>/ subpath imports across UA. Node resolves #ua/* and #sub/* by walking up from any system/library/**.ts to this file. tsconfig.json paths and any nested package.json `imports` MUST mirror this map. drift.ts (Pass 6) flags any #<alias>/ import in library source that this map does not declare.
